steps.t: Fastred is inside his home in Snowbourn. Despite Cynelac's warnings, you should warn Fastred of the impending attack on Walstow.
Fastred can be found inside his home in Snowbourn. While this is not the best moment to intrude upon his time, you must warn Fastred of the coming dan…
Gísling can be found in central Snowbourn. Since Fastred will not hear you, you should speak with Gísling.
